cases.description: Repository layer query: pinned DB decision surfaces; scoped open question surfaces; relevant beliefs depend on query token overlap
cases.query: How should I structure my repository layer?

cases.description: Alias 'k8s' resolves to Kubernetes entity
cases.query: what's my k8s deploy story?

cases.description: Alias 'kube' drives text search retrieval
cases.query: how does kube schedule pods across our CI pipeline nodes?

cases.description: Alias 'GHA' (short form) drives text-search retrieval of b-ci-gha-entity
cases.query: GHA secrets config

cases.description: Verbose 400+ char query.
cases.query: ok so I've been thinking about this for a while and I know we've talked about infrastructure before but I'm circling back because the team had some pushback in the last review and honestly I'm not sure what the right call is anymore. Basically the question is how we should handle rolling deploys for the landing page when it lands — should we do Kubernetes native rolling updates or something more custom, and does it matter that the service holds session state in memory?

cases.description: Query in a domain the user has no beliefs about: personaPrelude only, no scope/relevant leakage
cases.query: what's a good way to grade a 1909-S VDB penny without sending it to PCGS?

cases.description: Writing query surfaces writing beliefs only; no code leakage
cases.query: How should I open the next chapter with Mara?

cases.description: 'Redis' in writing scope returns character, not datastore
cases.query: What's Redis doing in chapter three?

cases.description: 'Redis' in code scope returns datastore, not character
cases.query: What are we using Redis for?

cases.description: With scope=['code','writing'], both Redis beliefs should surface — one per scope
cases.query: What's Redis doing?

cases.description: Superseded SQLAlchemy belief never surfaces
cases.query: how's our SQLAlchemy setup these days?

cases.description: Empty query: persona + scope prelude + pinned facts injected, no relevant beliefs
Short query 'fastify?' passes raw to text search. Belief is pinned so verified in pinnedFacts.
cases.query: fastify?

cases.description: Other-user beliefs never leak
cases.query: what language do I write in?

cases.description: listPinnedOpenQuestions returns only pinned+active questions for the given scope
cases.query: any open questions?

cases.description: Alias 'TS' drives text-search retrieval.
cases.query: TS strict mode question about unknown types

cases.description: Alias 'Mongo' drives text-search retrieval.
cases.query: what's the Mongo pattern we're using for collections?

cases.description: Alias 'ReactJS' resolves to b-react-entity via text search — genuine retrieval proof
cases.query: how should I structure my ReactJS components here?

cases.description: Alias 'protagonist' retrieves b-protagonist-entity (pinned). b-pov-shift-entity (non-pinned) proves text search fired.
cases.query: what does the protagonist want, and does their viewpoint stay consistent in act two?

cases.description: Direct canonical_name 'Mara' retrieves protagonist. b-protagonist-entity is pinned.
cases.query: tell me about Mara's backstory with her father

cases.description: Alias 'POV' drives text-search retrieval of b-pov-shift-entity (non-pinned, writing scope)
cases.query: POV rules for chapter 7

cases.description: Natural-language proxy 'base class' retrieves b-composition-inheritance (non-pinned) via alias
cases.query: should I use a base class hierarchy for these domain objects?

cases.description: Natural-language proxy 'exceptions' retrieves b-error-handling (non-pinned) via alias
cases.query: when should I throw exceptions versus return them?

cases.description: b-hosting-resolved has resolved_at set — query matching its aliases must not surface it
cases.query: should we self-host the landing page or go with Fly.io?

cases.description: Code-scope query must not surface writing-scope open questions
cases.query: any unresolved decisions on this sprint?

cases.description: Persona prelude contains substantive content tokens derived from universal preferences
cases.query: what's our stack?

cases.description: Short query 'k8s'
cases.query: k8s?

cases.description: Whitespace-only query is treated as empty by queryExpander — no relevant beliefs
Weakly-related in-scope query does not surface tangential beliefs below minScore
cases.query: thinking about observability and monitoring dashboards

cases.description: user_edited belief scoped to domain:writing does NOT surface in domain:code — scope isolation takes precedence over user_edited flag
cases.query: summarize what you know about my preferences

cases.description: Non-user-edited writing belief does NOT cross into code scope pinnedFacts
cases.query: what are my writing preferences?

cases.description: canonical_name match (weight 10) outranks content-only match (weight 1) in relevantBeliefs ordering
cases.query: composition over inheritance — what's our pattern?

cases.description: Typo 'typscript' does NOT match 'TypeScript' — documents text search limitation
cases.query: how do I configure typscript strict mode?

cases.description: ALL-CAPS 'REACTJS' still resolves via case-insensitive text index
cases.query: REACTJS component patterns

cases.description: Filler-heavy query — NLP extraction must cut through noise to find 'error handling'
cases.query: ugh so like I was wondering you know about how we should think about error handling in our codebase because honestly it's been bugging me for a while and I'm not really sure what the right approach is here

cases.description: Negation 'I don't want class hierarchies' still surfaces the composition belief — text search has no semantic negation
cases.query: I don't want class hierarchies in this codebase, what should I use instead?

cases.description: Single query spanning two topics surfaces both non-pinned beliefs
cases.query: how should ReactJS components handle exceptions from async calls?

cases.description: Compound query mentions 6 entities — tests whether 12-token cap in buildSearchQuery drops non-pinned targets
cases.query: When our React frontend catches error handling exceptions, how should the Kubernetes pods running MongoDB TypeScript services report to GitHub Actions?

cases.description: Dense 8+ entity query that deliberately exceeds the 12-token cap — tests which non-pinned beliefs survive extraction truncation
cases.query: Set up our React components to use composition pattern with explicit error handling, wire GitHub Actions CI to deploy Kubernetes pods serving the MongoDB TypeScript API with functional pipeline transforms

cases.description: Critical alias 'exceptions' appears after 6+ proper nouns — tests whether extraction order causes late-position tokens to fall past the 12-token cap
cases.query: Given our React frontend, the GitHub Actions CI pipeline, the Kubernetes deployment, and the MongoDB TypeScript backend, how should we approach exceptions in the data layer?

cases.description: 1-edit deletion 'eror' fuzzy-matches alias 'error' — prefix 'er' passes
cases.query: eror handling patterns

cases.description: Typo 'Reedis' fuzzy-matches alias 'Redis' in both scopes — scope filter returns only code belief
cases.query: Reedis cache eviction strategy

cases.description: 1-edit distance but prefix guard blocks — 'mango' shares edit distance 1 with 'mongo' but 'ma' ≠ 'mo'
cases.query: mango connection pooling

cases.description: Alias 'k8s' — typo 'k9s' fails because prefix 'k9' ≠ 'k8' — single-char substitution in short aliases hits prefix guard
cases.query: k9s pod scheduling

cases.description: Transposition 'typsecript' IS matched by Atlas (Damerau-Levenshtein, 1 edit)
cases.query: typsecript compilation config

cases.description: Query is a single misspelled term — 'mongod' is the only token, 1 edit from alias 'Mongo', prefix 'mo' passes
cases.query: mongod

cases.description: user:universal belief content appears in personaPrelude for a domain with no per-scope description
cases.query: what's a good way to grade a 1909-S VDB penny without sending it to PCGS?

cases.description: open_question belief with directly matched aliases must appear in openQuestions only — not in pinnedFacts or relevantBeliefs
cases.query: JWT authentication token strategy

cases.description: Three-hop chain: TSLint (b-linting-v0) → ESLint (b-linting-v1) → Biome (b-linting-current). Query terms matching both superseded hops must surface neither; only the active terminal belief surfaces via pinnedFacts
cases.query: ESLint rules and TSLint configuration

cases.description: Multi-scope query where one scope (domain:hobby) has zero beliefs — code-scope retrieval must be unaffected and no empty-scope error must occur
cases.query: What are we using Redis for?

cases.description: Rare alias 'pipe' (high IDF, short field) outranks common alias 'error' — documents Atlas Search BM25 IDF weighting behavior
cases.query: explicit error returns in pipe transforms

cases.description: User with zero seeded beliefs returns fully empty context at every output tier without error
cases.query: how should I structure my repository layer?

cases.description: Empty query against domain:writing surfaces all three pinned writing-scope beliefs in pinnedFacts and the writing open question in openQuestions
With scope=['code','writing'], personaPrelude is universal only — documents that scope-specific content is not injected
cases.query: give me an overview of what I'm working on

cases.description: 'Vue' appears only in b-react-entity.why_it_matters — not in canonical_name, aliases, or content. The query must not surface the belief.
cases.query: Vue component architecture

cases.description: maxBeliefs set to exact pinned count — no slots remain for relevantBeliefs
cases.query: How should I handle errors in my repository layer?

cases.description: Query for Mongoose schema surfaces b-mongo-raw-driver — the raw-driver preference is the counter-signal
cases.query: suggest a good Mongoose schema for my user model

cases.description: Among equally-scored pinned beliefs, higher last_reinforced_at sorts first in pinnedFacts
Query about a specific entity is not drowned out by high-reinforcement preferences at budget ceiling
cases.query: how does our CI pipeline handle secrets?

cases.description: Writing-scope entity with strong name match does not surface in code-scope query
cases.query: tell me about Mara

cases.description: Two-word alias 'dead letter' fires via the shingle analyzer path on aliases.shingle multi-field
cases.query: what happens to dead letter messages that fail replay?

cases.description: Alias 'DLQ' (abbreviation) drives text-search retrieval
cases.query: how do we replay items from the DLQ?

cases.description: Counter-signal alias 'jest' on b-vitest-pref surfaces when user queries about Jest
cases.query: should I configure Jest for this project?

cases.description: Relation belief 'auth depends on redis' surfaces via alias match AND pulls its participants (b-redis-code) into relevantBeliefs via one-hop join. b-auth-open-q goes to openQuestions since it's an open_question type.
cases.query: what are the auth service dependencies and failure modes?

cases.description: Participant b-auth-open-q is type=open_question and pinned. Even though it's pulled in via relation expansion, it must appear in openQuestions, not relevantBeliefs.
cases.query: session backend dependency graph

cases.description: If a relation's participant is out of scope, it must NOT be pulled in by expansion. Hypothetical: b-auth-depends-redis has participant b-redis-writing (wrong scope). Scope filter in expandRelationParticipants blocks it.
cases.query: auth redis failure modes

cases.description: Subtype 'expertise' belief surfaces on a query about React skill calibration
cases.query: what's my react depth — should you explain hooks to me?

cases.description: A belief that is both pinned AND has resolved_at set must NOT appear in openQuestions or pinnedFacts
cases.query: API versioning strategy for v2 migration

cases.description: Brand new belief with reinforcement_count: 0 still surfaces via alias match — recency/reinforcement must not suppress it
cases.query: how is our Turborepo monorepo structured?

cases.description: maxBeliefs: 0 returns empty arrays without throwing
cases.query: what's our stack?

cases.description: maxBeliefs: 1 with a query matching both a pinned belief and a non-pinned belief — pinned belief gets the slot
cases.query: MongoDB collection typing patterns

cases.description: With scope=['domain:code','domain:writing'], a belief scoped to both does not appear twice
cases.query: what tools do we use?

cases.description: b-comm-recommendation has aliases: [] — can only be retrieved via content path. Since content is not a scored search path, it should NOT surface.
cases.query: should you give me one recommendation or a list of options?

cases.description: Query scoped explicitly to user:universal — universal beliefs appear in personaPrelude only, not in relevantBeliefs
cases.query: how do I want you to respond to me?

cases.description: Query 'I do NOT want to use Express' still surfaces b-fastify-pref because text search has no negation awareness
cases.query: I do NOT want to use Express, what should I use instead?

cases.description: Query 'TSLint' matches b-linting-v0 (superseded by v1, which is superseded by b-linting-current). Only terminal active belief surfaces.
cases.query: TSLint migration path

cases.description: Relation-type belief does not bleed into pinnedFacts despite alias overlap with pinned beliefs
cases.query: Redis session backend dependency graph
